R0209.title: Illegal Outbound and C2 Control
R0209.definition: IoT devices infected with trojans actively connect to C2 servers to receive remote commands, becoming part of botnets.

references.title: Securing the Internet of Things (IoT) - CISA

R0209.description: IoT devices infected with trojans actively connect to C2 servers to receive remote commands, becoming part of botnets.
R0209.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
